auth.label: Authkey
auth.description: MSG91 authkey used with the official SMS and OTP APIs. Sign in to the MSG91 control panel to view or create API keys: https://control.msg91.com/signin/.

actions.name: resend_otp
actions.description: Resend an existing MSG91 OTP by text message or voice call.

mobile.description: Mobile number in international format with country code and without a plus sign.

retryType.description: The MSG91 retry channel for resending the OTP.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for resending an MSG91 OTP.

sent.description: Whether MSG91 accepted the OTP resend request.

anyOf.description: The MSG91 response message when returned.

raw.description: The raw JSON object returned by MSG91.

outputSchema.description: A normalized MSG91 OTP resend response.

actions.name: send_flow_sms
actions.description: Send an SMS through an approved MSG91 Flow template.

templateId.description: The MSG91 Flow SMS template ID from the MSG91 dashboard.

mobile.description: Recipient mobile number in international format with country code and without a plus sign.

variables.description: Template variable values keyed by the exact MSG91 template placeholder name.

items.description: One recipient for an MSG91 Flow SMS template.

recipients.description: The SMS recipients and template variables to send.

shortUrl.description: Whether MSG91 should enable this optional flag.

shortUrlExpirySeconds.description: The optional short URL expiry time in seconds when shortUrl is enabled.

realTimeResponse.description: Whether MSG91 should enable this optional flag.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for sending an MSG91 Flow SMS template.

accepted.description: Whether MSG91 accepted the message submission.

anyOf.description: The MSG91 response message when returned.
The MSG91 request identifier when returned.

raw.description: The raw JSON object returned by MSG91.

outputSchema.description: A normalized MSG91 message submission response.

actions.name: send_otp
actions.description: Generate or send an OTP with an MSG91 OTP template.

mobile.description: Recipient mobile number in international format with country code and without a plus sign.

templateId.description: The MSG91 OTP template ID from the MSG91 dashboard.

otp.description: A caller-supplied OTP value to send instead of an auto-generated OTP.

otpLength.description: The number of digits for an auto-generated OTP.

otpExpiryMinutes.description: The OTP expiry duration in minutes.

userIp.description: The end user's IP address for MSG91 security tracking.

unicode.description: Whether MSG91 should enable this optional flag.

invisible.description: Whether MSG91 should enable this optional flag.

realTimeResponse.description: Whether MSG91 should enable this optional flag.

variables.description: Template variable values keyed by the exact MSG91 template placeholder name.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for sending an MSG91 OTP.

sent.description: Whether MSG91 accepted the OTP send request.

anyOf.description: The MSG91 response message when returned.
The MSG91 OTP request identifier when returned.

raw.description: The raw JSON object returned by MSG91.

outputSchema.description: A normalized MSG91 OTP send response.

actions.name: verify_otp
actions.description: Verify an OTP previously sent through MSG91.

mobile.description: Mobile number in international format with country code and without a plus sign.

otp.description: The OTP value entered by the user.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for verifying an MSG91 OTP.

verified.description: Whether MSG91 reported that the OTP was verified.

anyOf.description: The MSG91 verification message when returned.
The MSG91 response code when returned.

raw.description: The raw JSON object returned by MSG91.

outputSchema.description: A normalized MSG91 OTP verification response.
